/plan "fix the plugin issues with scraping the property cards from the listing page. We are only scrolling the property list on the first page of results. We are then go to page 2, then 6, then 10, for scraping data, skipping many pages in the pagination. We need to understand why we are skipping so many, maybe awaiting for a control to load the property cards is timing out or something else. each card will have a unique url, all the pages should have the same amount of cards except the last page which may have less.
We need to wait at least 1 second per page to wait for page loading, humans don't paginate that quickly and we need to appear to be more human.
update docs and push to git
